title: agrostis rossiae
intro: Agrostis rossiae, also known as Ross's bent or Agrostis rossiae, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis rossiae are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support skin and wound health.
